message:
refactor(demo-showcase): update screens to use expanded theme system

Updates demo screens to leverage the enhanced theme infrastructure
from ftui-extras, improving visual consistency and reducing code
duplication.

Changes:
- dashboard.rs: Simplified with new theme helpers (-46 lines refactored)
- data_viz.rs: Cleaner color handling (-40 lines refactored)
- widget_gallery.rs: Updated color references
- theme.rs: Re-exports expanded core_theme functionality
- app.rs: Theme integration improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
